name: Agent Cost Analysis
description: Analyze GenAI agent spend, token consumption, and cost distribution across models, users, tools, and sessions.

name: Agent Invocations
description: Track agent invocation volume, outcomes, latency, tool calls, token usage, and request-level behavior for SWE-agent and GenAI workloads.

name: Claude Code Usage
description: Monitor Claude Code sessions, model usage, request patterns, token consumption, and PromQL-backed runtime signals.

name: Node Metrics Dashboard - PromQL
description: Monitor host-level CPU, memory, disk, network, filesystem, and load metrics from node exporter style PromQL data.

name: OTel Collector Metrics
description: Observe OpenTelemetry Collector throughput, receiver/exporter activity, queue behavior, dropped telemetry, and component inventory.

name: OTel Demo Application
description: Explore application, service, and telemetry behavior for the OpenTelemetry Astronomy Shop demo application.

name: Parseable Audit Logs
description: Review Parseable audit events, user activity, administrative actions, and access patterns from audit log datasets.

name: Parseable Metrics
description: Monitor Parseable service metrics including ingestion, query behavior, storage, runtime health, and system-level PromQL signals.

name: Parseable Server Logs
description: Analyze Parseable server logs, error patterns, request activity, status distribution, and runtime log trends.
